results.code:
212         rows = conn.execute(
213             f"""
214             WITH scoped AS (
215                 SELECT
216                     f.fact_type,
217                     f.fact_name,
218                     f.event_count,
219                     usage_events.record_id,
220                     usage_events.input_tokens,
221                     usage_events.cached_input_tokens,
222                     usage_events.uncached_input_tokens,
223                     usage_events.output_tokens,
224                     usage_events.reasoning_output_tokens,
225                     usage_events.total_tokens,
226                     usage_events.cache_ratio,
227                     usage_events.event_timestamp
228                 FROM call_diagnostic_facts AS f
229                 JOIN usage_events ON usage_events.record_id = f.record_id
230                 {where_clause}
231             ),
232             type_counts AS (
233                 SELECT
234                     fact_type,
235                     coalesce(SUM(event_count), 0) AS occurrences,
236                     COUNT(DISTINCT record_id) AS associated_calls,
237                     COUNT(DISTINCT fact_name) AS fact_names
238                 FROM scoped
239                 GROUP BY fact_type
240             ),
241             distinct_calls AS (
242                 SELECT
243                     fact_type,
244                     record_id,
245                     MAX(input_tokens) AS input_tokens,
246                     MAX(cached_input_tokens) AS cached_input_tokens,
247                     MAX(uncached_input_tokens) AS uncached_input_tokens,
248                     MAX(output_tokens) AS output_tokens,
249                     MAX(reasoning_output_tokens) AS reasoning_output_tokens,
250                     MAX(total_tokens) AS total_tokens,
251                     MAX(cache_ratio) AS cache_ratio,
252                     MAX(event_timestamp) AS event_timestamp
253                 FROM scoped
254                 GROUP BY fact_type, record_id
255             ),
256             call_sums AS (
257                 SELECT
258                     fact_type,
259                     coalesce(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS associated_input_tokens,
260                     coalesce(SUM(cached_input_tokens), 0) AS associated_cached_input_tokens,
261                     coalesce(SUM(uncached_input_tokens), 0)
262                         AS associated_uncached_input_tokens,
263                     coalesce(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS associated_output_tokens,
264                     coalesce(SUM(reasoning_output_tokens), 0)
265                         AS associated_reasoning_output_tokens,
266                     coalesce(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS associated_total_tokens,
267                     AVG(cache_ratio) AS avg_cache_ratio,
268                     MAX(total_tokens) AS largest_call_tokens,
269                     MAX(event_timestamp) AS latest_event_timestamp
270                 FROM distinct_calls
271                 GROUP BY fact_type
272             )
273             SELECT
274                 type_counts.fact_type,
275                 type_counts.occurrences,
276                 type_counts.associated_calls,
277                 type_counts.fact_names,
278                 call_sums.associated_input_tokens,
279                 call_sums.associated_cached_input_tokens,
280                 call_sums.associated_uncached_input_tokens,
281                 call_sums.associated_output_tokens,
282                 call_sums.associated_reasoning_output_tokens,
283                 call_sums.associated_total_tokens,
284                 call_sums.avg_cache_ratio,
285                 call_sums.largest_call_tokens,
286                 call_sums.latest_event_timestamp,
287                 (
288                     SELECT s2.fact_name
289                     FROM scoped AS s2
290                     WHERE s2.fact_type = type_counts.fact_type
291                     GROUP BY s2.fact_name
292                     ORDER BY SUM(s2.event_count) DESC, SUM(s2.uncached_input_tokens) DESC
293                     LIMIT 1
294                 ) AS top_fact_name
295             FROM type_counts
296             JOIN call_sums ON call_sums.fact_type = type_counts.fact_type
297             ORDER BY {sort_map[sort]} {direction_sql},
298                 associated_total_tokens DESC,
299                 type_counts.fact_type
300             {limit_clause}
301             """,
302             query_params,
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

38     rows = conn.execute(
39         f"""
40         WITH tool_counts AS (
41             SELECT
42                 record_id,
43                 COUNT(*) AS tool_call_count,
44                 COALESCE(SUM(output_size_bytes), 0) AS tool_output_size_bytes
45             FROM tool_calls
46             GROUP BY record_id
47         ),
48         command_counts AS (
49             SELECT
50                 record_id,
51                 COUNT(*) AS command_run_count,
52                 COALESCE(SUM(output_size_bytes), 0) AS command_output_size_bytes,
53                 SUM(CASE WHEN status != 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_command_count
54             FROM command_runs
55             GROUP BY record_id
56         ),
57         file_counts AS (
58             SELECT
59                 record_id,
60                 COUNT(*) AS file_event_count,
61                 SUM(CASE WHEN operation = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS file_read_count,
62                 SUM(CASE WHEN operation IN ('modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS file_write_count
63             FROM file_events
64             GROUP BY record_id
65         )
66         SELECT
67             u.record_id,
68             u.session_id,
69             u.thread_key,
70             u.thread_name,
71             u.parent_thread_name,
72             u.event_timestamp,
73             u.model,
74             u.effort,
75             u.call_initiator,
76             u.call_initiator_confidence,
77             u.total_tokens,
78             u.input_tokens,
79             u.cached_input_tokens,
80             u.uncached_input_tokens,
81             u.output_tokens,
82             u.reasoning_output_tokens,
83             u.model_context_window,
84             u.context_window_percent,
85             COALESCE(tc.tool_call_count, 0) AS tool_call_count,
86             COALESCE(tc.tool_output_size_bytes, 0) AS tool_output_size_bytes,
87             COALESCE(cc.command_run_count, 0) AS command_run_count,
88             COALESCE(cc.command_output_size_bytes, 0) AS command_output_size_bytes,
89             COALESCE(cc.failed_command_count, 0) AS failed_command_count,
90             COALESCE(fc.file_event_count, 0) AS file_event_count,
91             COALESCE(fc.file_read_count, 0) AS file_read_count,
92             COALESCE(fc.file_write_count, 0) AS file_write_count
93         FROM usage_events u
94         LEFT JOIN tool_counts tc ON tc.record_id = u.record_id
95         LEFT JOIN command_counts cc ON cc.record_id = u.record_id
96         LEFT JOIN file_counts fc ON fc.record_id = u.record_id
97         {where_sql}
98         ORDER BY u.total_tokens DESC, u.uncached_input_tokens DESC, u.event_timestamp DESC, u.record_id ASC
99         """,
100         params,

32     rows = conn.execute(
33         f"""
34         WITH filtered AS (
35             SELECT
36                 fe.file_event_key,
37                 fe.record_id,
38                 fe.operation,
39                 fe.path_hash,
40                 fe.path_basename,
41                 fe.path_extension,
42                 fe.path_identity,
43                 u.thread_key,
44                 u.thread_name,
45                 u.session_id,
46                 u.event_timestamp,
47                 u.total_tokens
48             FROM file_events fe
49             JOIN usage_events u ON u.record_id = fe.record_id
50             {where_sql}
51         ),
52         sequenced AS (
53             SELECT
54                 filtered.*,
55                 LAG(path_hash) OVER (
56                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)
57                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, record_id, file_event_key
58                 ) AS previous_path_hash
59             FROM filtered
60         )
61         SELECT
62             path_hash,
63             MIN(path_identity) AS path_identity,
64             MIN(path_basename) AS path_basename,
65             MIN(path_extension) AS path_extension,
66             COUNT(*) AS occurrences,
67             SUM(CASE WHEN operation = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS read_count,
68             SUM(CASE WHEN operation IN ('modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
69                 AS write_count,
70             SUM(CASE WHEN operation NOT IN ('read', 'modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
71                 AS other_operation_count,
72             COUNT(DISTINCT record_id) AS call_count,
73             COUNT(DISTINCT thread_key) AS thread_count,
74             COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count,
75             COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,
76             SUM(CASE WHEN previous_path_hash = path_hash THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
77                 AS adjacent_retouch_count,
78             MIN(event_timestamp) AS first_seen_at,
79             MAX(event_timestamp) AS last_seen_at
80         FROM sequenced
81         GROUP BY path_hash
82         HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?
83         ORDER BY
84             read_count DESC,
85             adjacent_retouch_count DESC,
86             occurrences DESC,
87             total_tokens DESC,
88             last_seen_at DESC
89         """,

78         sequenced AS (

82                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)
83                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, line_start, record_id, command_run_key
84                 ) AS previous_command_root,
85                 LAG(command_label) OVER (
86                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)
87                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, line_start, record_id, command_run_key
88                 ) AS previous_command_label

91         SELECT

94             COUNT(DISTINCT command_label) AS distinct_label_count,

96             COUNT(DISTINCT record_id) AS call_count,
97             COUNT(DISTINCT thread_key) AS thread_count,

99             COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,

101             SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(exit_code, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count,
102             SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(exit_code, 0) != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failure_count,
103             SUM(CASE WHEN command_root = previous_command_root THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
104                 AS adjacent_root_repeat_count,

115             adjacent_root_repeat_count DESC,
116             occurrences DESC,

results.code:
136     conn.execute(
137         f"""
138         INSERT INTO thread_summaries (
139             thread_key,
140             is_archived_scope,
141             thread_label,
142             first_event_timestamp,
143             latest_event_timestamp,
144             call_count,
145             session_count,
146             input_tokens,
147             cached_input_tokens,
148             uncached_input_tokens,
149             output_tokens,
150             reasoning_output_tokens,
151             total_tokens,
152             estimated_cost_usd,
153             usage_credits,
154             avg_cache_ratio,
155             max_context_window_percent,
156             max_recommendation_score,
157             primary_recommendation,
158             call_initiator_summary,
159             archived_call_count,
160             updated_at
161         )
162         SELECT
163             {thread_key_expr} AS thread_key,
164             ? AS is_archived_scope,
165             coalesce(max(thread_name), max(parent_thread_name), max(session_id)) AS thread_label,
166             MIN(event_timestamp) AS first_event_timestamp,
167             MAX(event_timestamp) AS latest_event_timestamp,
168             COUNT(*) AS call_count,
169             COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count,
170             coalesce(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS input_tokens,
171             coalesce(SUM(cached_input_tokens), 0) AS cached_input_tokens,
172             coalesce(SUM(uncached_input_tokens), 0) AS uncached_input_tokens,
173             coalesce(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS output_tokens,
174             coalesce(SUM(reasoning_output_tokens), 0) AS reasoning_output_tokens,
175             coalesce(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,
176             NULL AS estimated_cost_usd,
177             NULL AS usage_credits,
178             coalesce(AVG(cache_ratio), 0) AS avg_cache_ratio,
179             coalesce(MAX(context_window_percent), 0) AS max_context_window_percent,
180             coalesce(MAX(
181                 CASE
182                     WHEN context_window_percent >= 0.90 THEN 100
183                     WHEN cache_ratio < 0.20 AND input_tokens >= 50000 THEN 80
184                     WHEN total_tokens >= 100000 THEN 70
185                     ELSE 0
186                 END
187             ), 0) AS max_recommendation_score,
188             CASE
189                 WHEN MAX(context_window_percent) >= 0.90 THEN 'high_context_use'
190                 WHEN MIN(cache_ratio) < 0.20 AND MAX(input_tokens) >= 50000
191                     THEN 'low_cache_reuse'
192                 WHEN MAX(total_tokens) >= 100000 THEN 'large_calls'
193                 ELSE NULL
194             END AS primary_recommendation,
195             CASE
196                 WHEN SUM(
197                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'codex'
198                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
199                 ) > SUM(
200                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'user'
201                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
202                 )
203                     THEN 'mostly_codex'
204                 WHEN SUM(
205                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'user'
206                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
207                 ) > SUM(
208                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'codex'
209                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
210                 )
211                     THEN 'mostly_user'
212                 WHEN SUM(
213                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'unknown'
214                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
215                 ) = COUNT(*)
216                     THEN 'unknown'
217                 ELSE 'mixed'
218             END AS call_initiator_summary,
219             SUM(CASE WHEN coalesce(is_archived, 0) != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
220                 AS archived_call_count,
221             ? AS updated_at
222         FROM usage_events
223         {where_clause}
224         GROUP BY {thread_key_expr}
225         """,
226         [scope, updated_at, *params],
